title: Parker-Hannifin (PH)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Parker-Hannifin using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what PH is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-eqf5buf7>
PH has aggressively improved margins and integrated acquisitions. FCF grew from $2.36B in FY21 to $3.34B in FY25, about a 9% CAGR. Assuming 8% growth is appropriately conservative while rewarding the company for its proven execution and aerospace momentum.
